mapper.insert: insert into cars(car_id, brand, model, year, mileage, price, registered_at) values(#{car_id}, #{brand}, #{model}, #{year}, #{mileage}, #{price}, #{registered_at})
mapper.update: update cars set brand=#{brand}, model=#{model}, year=#{year}, mileage=#{mileage}, price=#{price}, registered_at=#{registered_at} where car_id=#{car_id}
mapper.select: select brand as brand_name, COUNT(*) as brand_count from cars group by brand
select * from cars where year between #{param1} and #{param2} order by year;
